docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY TRIPP, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ZELICHENOK, MASHA DBA MASHKA JEWELRY & ALCHIMA JEWLERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DAVID TRIPP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MASHA ZELICHENOK DBA MASHKA JEWERLY & ALCHIMIA JEWELRY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRIPP, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZELICHENOK, MASHA DBA MASHKA JEWELRY & ALCHIMA JEWLERY THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT A VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1723 AS NOTICE OF DEFENDANT'S RETURN/REFUND POLICY IS POSTED AT THE POINT OF SALE AND ON DEFENDANT'S ORDER FORM AND PURCHASE RECEIPT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-29-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-02-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED NOV-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZELICHENOK, MASHA DBA MASHKA JEWELRY & ALCHIMA JEWLERY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 SERVED OCT-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZELICHENOK, MASHA DBA MASHKA JEWELRY & ALCHIMA JEWLERY
